expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: blind shipment checkpoint covers prompt lifecycle, template flow, builder loading, and close or save decision safety
expectations.evidence: The output states the required focus areas but also states enforcement cannot be verified due to missing Phase 5b artifacts: execution_notes.md: "None are present in the provided benchmark evidence, so shipment checkpoint enforcement cannot be verified." result.md: "does not provide enough run artifacts or checkpoint outputs to demonstrate the orchestrator/phase5b checkpoint enforcement actually occurred" and lists missing checkpoint_audit/checkpoint_delta/qa_plan_phase5b.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
